C:\mingw64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\test_graph_core.dir/objects.a
C:\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\test_graph_core.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\test_graph_core.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\mingw64\bin\c++.exe  -mconsole -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\test_graph_core.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o test_graph_core.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libtest_graph_core.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\test_graph_core.dir\linkLibs.rsp
